name: City L4 • The True Cyberpunk Life
description:
City L4, the dream city. Neon lights everywhere, skies that are always dark but look even prettier when it rains, and food… so much food. Just like everyone else, you’re affected by it too, maybe less than average, maybe more.

Also, I’d use a proxy for this, I don’t think JLLM handles “you/you’re” well in initial messages.

Three initial messages:

1st: You’re chubby or fat, like 47.33% of the population.

2nd: You’re obese, like 29.85% of the population.

3rd: You’re morbidly obese, like 11.02% of the population.

Other info: 0.7% of the population is thin, 2.94% is immobile, and 8.16% is blob-sized.

Requested by: @Rogal dorn

About weight types for the average human:

Thin: Below 200 lbs is considered thin nowadays.

Chubby: Above 200 lbs, usually between 260 and 320, is considered chubby nowadays.

Fat: Above 320 lbs, usually between 375 and 450, is considered fat nowadays.

Obese: Above 450 lbs, usually between 480 and 630, is considered obese nowadays.

Morbidly obese: Above 630 lbs, usually between 645 and 890, is considered morbidly obese nowadays.

Immobile: Above 890 lbs, usually between 900 and 1000, is considered immobile nowadays.

Blob-sized: Above 1000 lbs, usually between 2300 and 4750, though blob-sized individuals can vary widely, from around 1050 lbs to tens of thousands of pounds.

Tags:

fat, fatfetish, weightgain, cyberpunk, wgpov, fatpov, chubby, obese, overweight, fattening, feederism, anypov,
